items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Astonishing, {PlayerName}! Aren’t you just full of surprises?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Well... Let's see here. This Induction Cell seems to be intact. Once we install this back to where it belongs, all it takes for me is to adjust some settings to restore the station’s data.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: There's not a door to block us this time, but the Cell is missing.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: *sigh* It's either one problem or the other. I can't even hand over my shift properly. How useless I am...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Err... This isn’t really your fault, is it?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Constant moaning about these matters won't do you any good... You are familiar with this place more than any of us. Why don't you try recalling where the Cell may be?

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Come to think of it... Nearby Exiles sometimes come here to steal things.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: But they usually go for food or scrap metals, stuff like that. They don’t have the guts to try and take something like this... What happened this time?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Hmm... It's a clue at least. Lead the way. We should talk with the Exiles nearby.

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Ow, ow, ow! Alright, Alright! I get it, Boss. I give up, okay!?

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Out with it. Where are you keeping the Induction Cell?

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: I-Induction Cell? We've never even heard of it before.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It's a rectangular piece with smooth edges. It has a metallic frame, cold on the hands, and is rather heavy to carry...

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Oh! That! Yes, yes. We’ve seen it before.

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: The TDs’ been coming over here a lot these days. And we saw them getting into a huge fight with those uniform guys the other day.

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: They were fighting over that big tin box like crazy. We thought it must be some kind of treasure, and brought it back after everything went all quite.

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Couldn’t figure out for the life of us what it was or used for, so we just tossed it aside.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Enough yammering. Just tell us where it is!

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Hey! Easy, easy buddy! I-I don’t remember where it is. It’s been a while since we tossed it. Okay...?

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: How about a physical reminder on the head. Eh?

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Eek! I swear, I can’t remember!

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Why... why don’t you go look for it yourself? It’s probably in that pile over there.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It appears we are short on screening options for the time being. We’ll just have to resort to the old-fashioned way.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Fine. We’ll find it ourselves.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: One moment. There’s one more thing I’d like to ask.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Do you recall seeing anyone else besides the Rangers recently?

items.speaker: Lowly Exile
items.text: Oh, yeah. There was someone who wore the same uniform as you and was always repairing stuff near the surveillance station. Haven't seen them lately, though.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I see...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Well, it’s more than that...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It’s a long story. Let’s focus on the task at hand first.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Hmm... Now that the last Cell is back in place, the entire line has been connected, so it’ll take some time for the data to transfer.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Wait... I hear movement outside!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: What the...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Tsk... These guys look like they mean business...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: They’ve got us outnumbered, what are we gonna do...

options.text: Don't worry. That’s what I’m here for.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I admire your confidence, but be cautious not to get too overconfident.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: You’ve got some skills I’ll give you that, but don’t get your guard down...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: These TDs may look large in size, but as long as we can figure out their frequencies and exploit their weaknesses, we may be able to gain the upper hand.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: We should take the initiative and attack from our side to widen our chances of winning.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Yeah, these TDs aren’t going anywhere anyway... Here goes nothing. I’m not letting anything get in my way of turning in this shift!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Whew— Outstanding work!

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Good thing I had {PlayerName} covering my back... Wouldn’t have done it without {Male=him;Female=her}...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: So... Now that we’ve taken care of our TD problem. How about we check on the data transfer?

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: If it's already done, then my work here is almost complete...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: One moment. The frequencies of these TDs seem very unusual. I’d like to collect some data.
Qiuwang collected a set of TD frequency data.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It is done. We should head back to the surveillance station for a further analysis.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Another empty building...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: The place’s been like this ever since that battle...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: There's one last approach—activate the radar.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Once done, we may find new information from the station’s data.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I can’t say for certain there will be any. But at this point, there’s only one way to find out...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The last data... Our last hope.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: This is the place, let's go in.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Hmm... The door seems a little strange...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The rocks must’ve smashed the supporting beam, so the wall tilted inside and jammed the door.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Indeed. The roof has been punctured cleanly through by a large rock.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: I wonder if we can repair it... *sigh*... Everything's breaking down all over the place lately...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It would seem repairs are unnecessary. Better to tear everything down and rebuild.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Well, things breaking down isn’t necessarily a bad thing. No construction without destruction. Don’t you agree?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: You work fast, {PlayerName}. You’ll make for a great engineer. Have you considered becoming one?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Ahh. That’s a shame. But I agree that one should decide their own path and walk it on their own free will.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Haha. You were quick to answer. Why don’t you give it some more experience before you come to a final decision?
Qiuwang utters as he continues to adjust the Induction Cell.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It is done! Data link complete... We now have access to the Tacet Discord incursion on record.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Incursion records? I thought restoring the data was all we needed to do?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Restoring the data is only a temporary solution. With this record, we can study the TDs’ behaviors, in order to better formulate measures to strengthen our defenses and eliminate future problems.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Which is also the ultimate goal of my assignment... Performing constant repairs is simply unfeasible long-term.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: As you can see, all three surveillance stations are currently damaged. It will take a significant amount of time for even the most skilled engineers to repair and have them fully back and running.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Not to mention the numerous dangers they may encounter along the way...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Ahem. In short, our work at this station has concluded. We should move on to the next one.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I shall entrust you for protection if we come across anything unexpected.
Qiuwang installed the Induction Cell back in its place.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Hmmm... There. It’s connected!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I’ve managed to gain acces of data on the TDs’ behaviors as well... So the reports about how quickly they’re adapting were true...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: How is this possible...?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: One more surveillance station to go and the radars can be back online.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It seems the only way we can solve this mystery is by getting the last set of data...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Before we do, there’s more work ahead of us.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Data link complete... TD behavior record download complete...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Qiuwang gives a strange face after he carefully compares the data sets—his eyes sparkle with surprise, but the corners of his mouth curl down slightly into a bitter smile.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Just like my mentor said, the TDs in this area have evolved. They now coordinate their attacks and finish off their targets...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Yes. My mentor. The engineer that was last assigned to this station.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: A while ago, I received a message from him mentioning the TDs in this area were evolving in abnormal speed. His speculations are now proven true after witnessing what had happened today for myself.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I've collected most of the data mentioned in the message, however...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The reason for this evolution remains a mystery. The same can be said about the whereabouts of my mentor...

options.text: So you were looking for your mentor.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Yes... I haven't heard from him since he sent me the message...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Considering the speed at which the TDs are evolving, I'm afraid he...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: ...Don't give up. There's still a place we haven't been to yet.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: The radar station. We should give the place a look.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Hello there. Are you the ones who’s taken the cell?

items.speaker: Arrogant Exile
items.text: Caramel? What caramel? We be eaten all the caramel if we had them!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Err... Not caramel. Cell.

items.speaker: Arrogant Exile
items.text: Caramel, cellamel. They be the same.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: It’s just an act. I’ve seen it all before.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: You try talk sense to these airheads and all you’re going to get is a dead end.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Some good-old beating is the only way to deal with these clowns.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: It seems luck is on our side. We have the Cell!

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Didn’t expect my luck to make a turn from digginig through a garbage dump...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: You may be surprised at what you can find even in garbage. Perhaps there are items in those other piles that would prove useful to us as well...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Tell me you're not thinking what I think you're thinking...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: *chuckle* I'm fine with either. Let’s leave the decision to {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: What did I say!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: In the end, there’s always a balance in between fortune and misfortune.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Once a bad luck passes, a good luck would follow.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Why don’t we take advantage of our good luck and search the other piles? We might find even more treasures...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Haha. Let’s leave the decision to {PlayerName}.!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: What did I say!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: In the end, there’s always a balance in between fortune and misfortune.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Once a bad luck passes, a good luck would follow.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Why don’t we take advantage of our good luck and search the other piles? We might find even more treasures...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Haha. Let’s leave the decision to {PlayerName}.!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: What did I say!

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: In the end, there’s always a balance in between fortune and misfortune.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Once a bad luck passes, a good luck would follow.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Think of it this way. We gained some useful items searching the first two garbage piles, and now we have the Cell as well.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I’d say it’s a fruitful outcome! A form of good fortune, wouldn’t you say so?

The radar's beam of light shines on Hé Chou's tired eyes as it powers up. But after a few seconds, his eyes dim again—it's a light he’s seen countless times, only to be swallowed by darkness. No one knows how long it will last this time, but for someone about to leave, its duration no longer matters.
Qiuwang rushes to collect data, his fingers slightly trembling as he enters the inputs. Despite the nerves, his years of experience ensure he makes no mistakes.
Beep—Data transfer complete.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Frequencies. Mixed with chaos and clamor...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Dozens of Elite Class TDs... and ten individuals who fought to their last.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Among them were nine elites and one untrained.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Ziqin, Zhiyou, Nianhan... It’s the nine Rangers that were stationed here together with me.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The nine people fought against the TDs while protecting the untrained.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The frequency gradually weakened and disappeared... Only one TD and the untrained person remained.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Later the frequency demonstrated a steady pattern, and the waveform resembled the comparative experiments often carried out in laboratories...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: But this time, it was done on the field.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The slight tremors on the waveform reveal the agony of being torn apart...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Yes.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: After completing a set of comparative experiments, the person ended their own life.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: After completing a set of comparative experiments, the person ended their own life.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The TD followed suit by performing the same action...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: You mean to tell me that this person, knowing he’s got no way of escaping, collected the frequency of the TD’s evolution rate on the spot, and by using their quirk of of copying human behaviors, guided it to destroy itself?

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: To do this, you have to be someone with a heap of experience in TD research.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: As far as I know, there’s only one person that checks the box ...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Everyone falls silent.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: ...I've managed to calm down a bit. I feel much better now.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: To be honest. From the moment I received my mentor’s message, I had a feeling that his fate has been sealed.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Being a strict person that he always is, he never talks about anything other than research.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: But in that message, besides the research data, there were also a few words of advice.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: "This work proved to be a very dangerous one. Should you continue, you risk losing your loved ones, friends... and everything you hold dear till this day."

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: "Looking back from the end, the data you worked so hard to obtain is but a candle in the wind, always on the verge of being extinguished."

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: "If you still decide to carry on despite knowing all of this."

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: "Then come to the Desorock Highland. It's time for you to take over."

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: ...I didn’t realize you went through all of this... I even tried to act tough on you, and kept mumbling on and on...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: You're in as much pain as I am... but you didn't stop or complain, and continued moving on...

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: I'm just... so useless. No wonder I can't do anything right...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: Well, you’ve done quite well yourself all this time.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: You were with us the whole time, providing information and clearing paths... You even brought along a  strong helper like {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: You and your squad have fulfilled your duties well.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: On the battlefield, your sacrifices and resistance is what prevented the radar from suffering any major damage.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: And later your tireless efforts paved way for the swift repairs of the radar.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: All of this wouldn’t have been achieved without any of us.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: ...You're right.

options.text: So, what do we do next?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: We are in your debt, {PlayerName}. You had no obligation to do so, yet your aid is inmeasurable.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I shall double me efforts in studying these precious data we have worked so hard to collect.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I shall continue to study these precious data we managed to collect.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: After analysing the waveforms, I have come to a preliminarily conclusion that the abnormal evolution rate of the Tacet Discords in this area is correlated to the surrounding environment and the simulation subjects.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The Rangers who fought till the end.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: TDs imitate behaviors to evolve. The more they fight, the faster they evolve.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: That's how they learned our tactics! Whenever we defended a surveillance point, they seized it. When we guarded an Induction Cell, they tried to capture it. And when we protected the researcher, the TDs rushed for him too.

items.speaker: Hé Chou
items.text: Which means that the more we resist, the faster they adapt? What are we going to do about it?

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: TDs can only "imitate" and cannot truly learn. They are merely a jumble of chaotic frequencies, not intelligent beings.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: They bear no distinguish between good or evil, right from wrong. They simply imitate, prey, and attack...

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: As long as we make use of this quality, we can bend the situation to our advantage and develop defensive technologies to prevent them from causing harm the surveillance and radar stations ever again.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: The data that my mentor left behind for me at the end was a clear indication in this direction... I will devote all my efforts into promoting this technology.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: What do we have here...? The radar's detection accuracy has gone up and revealed a few uncharted areas after it was brought back online.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: My mentor once told me that these kinds of places usually store unknown treasures. Obtaining this precious data today is more than adequate for me, so I'll leave these treasures to you, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Qiuwang
items.text: I hope you can also experience the surprise and excitement of exploring the unknown.
